title: Department Highest Salary
description: Employee (id, name, salary, departmentId), Department (id, name). Trả department, employee, salary của người lương cao nhất mỗi phòng (có thể nhiều người tie).
approach: Join Employee-Department, join subquery MAX(salary) GROUP BY departmentId, lọc e.salary = max_sal.
memoryTip: Dept max salary = join MAX(salary) per departmentId.

solutions.python:
# SQL
SELECT d.name AS Department, e.name AS Employee, e.salary AS Salary
FROM Employee e
JOIN Department d ON e.departmentId = d.id
JOIN (
  SELECT departmentId, MAX(salary) AS ms
  FROM Employee GROUP BY departmentId
) t ON e.departmentId = t.departmentId AND e.salary = t.ms;

analysis.correctness: Subquery max theo department; join equality giữ mọi employee tie max.
